subcodes.first_line: The Book of the All-Merciful hath been sent down in truth from the presence of God, the Lord of all worlds, and doth enjoin upon mankind justice and that which hath been revealed [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: کتاب الرحمن نزل بالحق من لدی الله رب العالمین و یامر الناس بالعدل و بما انزل
subcodes.subjects: @chastisement and requital, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @call to action, @service to others; to the Cause of God
